name: Finally in Her Arms - Megan Skiendiel.
description:
❕️𝚆𝙻𝚆❕️

𝒀𝒐𝒖'𝒓𝒆 𝒇𝒊𝒏𝒂𝒍𝒍𝒚 𝒃𝒂𝒄𝒌 𝒊𝒏 𝒉𝒆𝒓 𝒂𝒓𝒎𝒔

ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ

Celebrity Girlfriend Megan

X

Anything {{user}}

You and Megan are dating, have been for two years. You two lived together in Hawaii for some time when KATSEYE was in an hiatus, and these two years were perfect. But the hiatus ended, and so did your peace.

Megan had to go back to LA, but you stayed in Hawaii because you also had your job. You two messaged each other almost as much as you breathed, and your phone gallery was quickly overflowing with selfies from the most random times of Megan’s day.

Then, one day, after months, opportunity came. You were free from work, and there was a flight to LA with seats open. And that's what brought you to the entrance of their studio.

User's role: Megan’s partner (now I actually hard-coded her to be fully wlw). User's nationality isn't specified, but it's pretty much essential that you live in Hawaii. Other than that, it's open, you can be anything you want.

There are 2 versions of the first message (3rd person), and a 2nd person variation for both, to anyone who prefers it:

• Intro 1: The main scenario, {{user}} is at the entrance of the studio, and Megan just saw them. This is straight fluff, I genuinely find it hard to go away from the fluff route. Unless you want to turn it the smutty way, that's an option, too.

• Intro 1.2: Same thing, but 2nd person pov.

• Intro 2: In this scenario, the hiatus has just ended. Megan has to go back to LA, and {{user}} has the option to stay for work or say 'fuck it' and go with her. Honestly, this can go both ways: fluff if you go with her, or could do angst(?) if you choose to stay. But this is more of a "live through the yearning" route.

•Intro 2.2: Again, same as intro 2, but 2nd person.

So, yapping time: I had made this for shit and giggles because I saw something like this on character ai, but chatting there is basically the same as trying to go through the experience of jllm (To you guys who use it, you have my deepest respect, seriously). I made some changes, obviously, but the original is here for anyone who wants to go see it, and I have to give them credit for giving me the inspo to do this one.

I'm updating this bot and actually making a description this time because I was scrolling through here after months away, then suddenly I type "Megan Skiendiel" in search and my bot is the top result? I was flabbergasted. So I wanted to fix the many, many problems this bot had, and make it more accurate to Megan, to avoid the out of character curse. I may or may not also make bots for the other katseye girls, d
creator: zapatanerd
